description: List file transfer history. Returns recent send/receive records with speed, status, and error info.

include_recoverable_receipts.description: When true, response `data.recoverable_receipts` lists non-terminal receipts from the SQLite journal.

lifecycle.description: Filter by lifecycle hint: `transient | durable | ephemeral`.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 20).

mcp_auth_token.description: Local MCP auth token. Required only when the server has `AEROSYNC_MCP_SECRET` set.

metadata_filter.description:
Filter by user_metadata key/value pairs. Multiple entries
AND together. A record matches only if every requested key
is present with the requested value.

since.description: Inclusive lower bound on `completed_at`, RFC-3339 timestamp.

until.description: Inclusive upper bound on `completed_at`, RFC-3339 timestamp.
